meta.title: When a Russian attack helicopter fired on the press
meta.description:
In 2017, a Russian KA-52 attack helicopter opened fire on a crowd of journalists and spectators during a training exercise meant as a massive show of force on NATO’s Eastern border, known as Zapad. 

The Russian government denied that it happened... until footage of the incident surfaced online.
